---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AgentFortress
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. I'm trying to protect my agent from [...] but AgentFortress doesn't support [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Use case**
What agent framework are you using? What threat are you trying to detect?

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
